title: Vivo V70 FE confirmed to launched in India: Launch date, expected specs and all you need to know
summary: The Vivo V70 FE will launch in India on April 2, 2026. Leaks suggest that the device could feature a 200MP camera, a MediaTek 7360 processor, and a large 7000mAh battery.

title: X down for thousands of users, global outage disrupts timeline and mobile app
summary: Elon Musk's social media platform X is experiencing outages, affecting thousands of users. Downdetector reports over 30,000 complaints regarding the platform's functionality today.

title: Samsung reveals Galaxy A37, A57 India price: Check launch offers, specificiations and more
summary: Samsung has finally revealed the pricing for its Galaxy A series lineup which was launched yesterday. The Galaxy A37 begins at a price of ₹41,999 while the Galaxy A57 starts at ₹56,999.

title: One Tech Tip: Heres how AI can (and cant) help you in your job hunt
summary: One Tech Tip: Here's how AI can (and can't) help you in your job hunt

title: Meta to turn employees into ‘AI builders’, reorganize teams into smaller pods amid Reality Labs layoffs: Report
summary: Meta is rebranding employees as AI builders and organising them into pods within its Reality Labs division, according to a new report. The pilot program is aimed at enhancing engineering productivity and product quality through cross-disciplinary work.

title: Apple to 'distill' Google's Gemini into smaller models to power localized iPhone AI features: Report
summary: Apple's partnership with Google allows it to ‘distill’ Gemini model to create smaller models to run AI features on device on iPhones. Apple had earlier this year announced its partnership with Google to power Siri and run other AI features

title: Discord says technical issue resolved hours after users complained of downtime
summary: Discord had reported an issue after 14,000 users faced issues in connecting on voice call. Many reported seeing the message ‘awaiting endpoint’, signaling a failure to establish voice communication

title: Gemini gets a major upgrade as Google adds 3-minute AI music generation: here's how it works
summary: Gemini's new Lyria 3 Pro integration enables the creation of 3-minute music tracks with improved fidelity and customization. It supports diverse applications, from study music to jingles, while adhering to copyright policies with embedded SynthID watermarks for content verification.

title: AI is giving bad advice to flatter its users, says new study on dangers of overly agreeable chatbots
summary: Sycophancy or behaviour that was overly agreeable and affirming is complicated. While few people are looking to AI for factually inaccurate information, they might appreciate - at least in the moment - a chatbot that makes them feel better about making the wrong choices.

title: Google Gemini now lets users import memories and chats from rival chatbots
summary: Google launched “switching tools” in Gemini, letting users import “memories” and full chat histories from other AI apps. The feature quickly transfers preferences and context, making adoption easier. The move targets to attract users of rivals like OpenAI and Anthropic and make them switch to Gemini

title: AI used to make 'fetishised' images of disabled women
summary: Some account owners use artificial intelligence to manipulate real images of non-disabled women, making them appear to have Down syndrome, a genetic condition caused by an extra chromosome. "This is a scam and is not only in bad taste but is potentially offensive and hurtful to people who have Down'

title: US State Department launches new $250 million Pax Silica Fund to secure semiconductor supply chains
summary: The United States Department of State launched a new USD 250 million Pax Silica Fund initiative, designed to reinforce the security and reliability of global semiconductor supply chains.

title: OpenAI's US ad pilot exceeds $100 million in annualised revenue in six weeks
summary: OpenAI's ChatGPT ads pilot in the United States has crossed ​the $100 million annualised revenue mark ​within six weeks of launch, a company spokesperson ​said on Thursday, pointing to robust early demand for the AI startup's nascent advertising business.

title: Claude AI maker Anthropic considers IPO as soon as October
summary: Anthropic PBC is considering going public as soon as in October, according to people familiar with the matter, as the artificial intelligence company races with rival OpenAI Inc. to hold an initial public offering.

title: Muted Q4 awaits IT large caps as clock ticks slow on AI gains
summary: Forrestor expects tech services spending in the U.S to grow by 5.2% in 2026, and global tech services spending to grow at 4.6%, with the latent demand for AI-led services expected to fuel service providers’ revenue growth, Sharma highlighted.

title: Netflix raises subscription prices across all plans in US
summary: Netflix, ​which has ​more than 325 million subscribers, had ⁠scrapped its cheapest ad-free plan, called basic, ​in 2023, leaving users with its ​more expensive premium and standard plans, as well as the standard plan with ads.

title: India’s tech hiring edge; Fashion funding heats up
summary: Happy Friday! AI and lower-cost talent have given a hiring advantage to countries like India, Philippines and Brazil. This and more in today’s ETtech Morning Dispatch.

title: White House AI czar Sacks to step down, moves to advisory role
summary: David Sacks was appointed to his role ‌in December 2024, but under US rules, special government employees are limited to 130 days ​of work ​in a 12-month ⁠period. The cap applies to days worked rather than the overall length of the appointment.
